description: This API is used to enable or disable the simulation option setting which scans buses for voltage recovery (primary and secondary recovery). This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = set_voltage_rec_check(vprchk, vsrchk, vprthr, vprtim, vsrthr, vsrtim) ierr, vprchk, vsrchk, vprthr, vprtim, vsrthr, vsrtim = set_voltage_rec_check()
python_syntax: ierr = set_voltage_rec_check(vprchk, vsrchk, vprthr, vprtim, vsrthr, vsrtim) ierr, vprchk, vsrchk, vprthr, vprtim, vsrthr, vsrtim = set_voltage_rec_check()

parameters.name: vprchk
parameters.description: None. (input; flag to set voltage primary recovery check: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: vsrchk
parameters.description: None. (input; flag to set voltage secondary recovery check: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: vprthr
parameters.description: None. (input; voltage primary recovery threshold in per unit: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: vprtim
parameters.description: None. (input; voltage primary recovery time in seconds: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: vsrthr
parameters.description: None. (input; voltage secondary recovery threshold in per unit: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

parameters.name: vsrtim
parameters.description: None. (input; voltage secondary recovery time in seconds: if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: invalid specification of VPRTHR and VSRTHR.
invalid specification of VPRTIM and VSRTIM.
prerequisite requirements for API not met.
